prompt: I have a data processing pipeline. Stage 1 reads CSVs and produces cleaned records. Stage 2 enriches them with API data. Stage 3 writes to the database. Each record has about 15 fields. How should I represent the data flowing between stages?

assertions.text: Uses Pydantic at the pipeline entry point (CSV parsing) and for external API responses
Uses dataclass or plain objects for data flowing between internal pipeline stages, OR explains the tradeoff if using Pydantic throughout
Does NOT add Pydantic validation at every internal handoff — validates at boundaries, trusts internally
